prompts.text: Create a corrected production world-direction sheet for the same Beastbound Odyssey village guard shown in both references. Preserve exactly the established identity and design: adult tall male guard, warm brown skin, square jaw, short black braids tied at the back, small vertical eyebrow scar, rust-red short cloak, charcoal layered light armor, bone-white forearm and calf wraps, dark brown boots, short stone-tipped spear, oval dark leather shield, warm dark outlines, restrained hand-painted 2.5D cel-rendered game style, lighting, material language, and proportions. Deliver one lossless opaque PNG sheet with a strict 2-row by 4-column grid and no dividers. Canonical row-major directions must be independently authored as: top row south, southwest, west, northwest; bottom row north, northeast, east, southeast. Direction semantics are mandatory: south is complete front; north is complete back with no face; southwest and southeast are distinct front diagonals; northwest and northeast are distinct back diagonals. The west cell is the critical correction: nose tip, chest axis, boot toes, and travel axis must all unmistakably point toward the LEFT side of the canvas. The east cell must point toward the RIGHT. Do not mirror, flip, duplicate, rotate, relabel, swap, or reuse a direction pose. Keep the same person, costume, spear, shield, scale, baseline, and camera across all eight cells. Center each full body separately inside its cell with at least 12% empty background clearance from every cell edge, the outer canvas, and all invisible cell seams; no subject pixel, antialias fringe, prop, cloak, foot, or spear may approach or cross an edge or seam. Background must be a perfectly uniform, textureless, fully opaque flat chroma magenta close to #FF00FF and clearly outside the guard palette: no gradient, vignette, noise, lighting, bloom, shadow, checkerboard, floor, horizon, scenery, or color variation. Give every silhouette and prop a clean hard near-black outer contour at least 3 source pixels thick. The contour-to-background boundary must be crisp and unfeathered: no magenta/purple spill, halo, glow, semi-transparent blend, soft matte, or colored antialias pixels around hair, cloak, skin, boots, spear, or shield. No text, labels, arrows, numbers, border, grid line, UI, watermark, blood, magic, or second character. Return only the corrected same-aspect 2x4 world sheet.
negativeConstraints: no duplicate or relabeled direction cells
north must be a complete back view with no visible face
northwest and northeast must remain visually distinct back diagonals
no labels, arrows, borders, UI, watermark or scenery
no cropped world subject or cell-edge crossing
no StoneAge source art, character, texture or costume copying
prompts.model: OpenAI built-in image generation; model identifier not exposed by tool

parameters.identityBoardRelationship: identity-board-raw.png is the separately generated identity authority; the accepted world v6 and accepted portrait v3 are independent image_gen hard-edge chroma regenerations using that board, while each rejected predecessor is reference-only.

prompts.text:
Use case: identity-preserve.
Asset type: clean-source regeneration of a production dialogue portrait expression sheet for Beastbound Odyssey.

The first supplied image, the guard identity board, is the exact identity authority. The second supplied image is a rejected portrait sheet and is composition/expression reference only: it has shield fragments crossing from the left cells into the right cells. Regenerate the complete sheet as new authored pixels. Do not edit, trace, copy pixel-for-pixel, or preserve any cross-cell residue from the rejected sheet.

Create an exact 2x2 sheet of the same original adult male village entrance guard, chest/waist-up, front three-quarter facing slightly screen-left. Preserve his square jaw, warm-brown skin, deep-brown eyes, shallow old scar over his own left eyebrow, black short braids tied into a tiny tail, clean-shaven face, charcoal layered leather armor, rust-red shoulder cape, bone-white binding, and small belt/shoulder details. The compact spear and shield must not dominate the portrait; show at most a small attached hint that remains completely inside its own cell. Use the same camera, crop, eye line, head size, shoulder width, lighting, body scale and identity in all four cells.

Exact row-major expression order:
top-left neutral alert and approachable with mouth closed;
top-right speaking naturally mid-sentence;
bottom-left restrained friendly smile;
bottom-right mildly concerned and watchful, not angry, grieving or crying.
Change only the expression and tiny supporting eyebrow/head movement.

Use an exact invisible 2x2 grid with no borders, labels, dividers, text, arrows, UI or watermark. Center the complete visible bust inside the central 62% of every cell. Keep at least 12% uniform background padding at the left and right sides of each cell. No hair, cape, armor, shield, spear, outline, antialiasing, shadow, loose fragment or neighboring-cell pixel may touch or cross any cell boundary. There must be exactly one connected portrait subject per cell and no detached lines, dots, weapon fragments or residue.

The entire background must be perfectly uniform, fully opaque, flat exact #FF00FF with a crisp hard boundary around the subject: no gradient, texture, checkerboard, scene, floor, cast shadow, glow or halo. Reserve magenta exclusively for the removable background. Do not use magenta, hot pink, purple or violet anywhere in skin, hair, eyes, scar, mouth, clothing, metal, leather, outline, shading, antialiasing or props. Keep the guard palette strictly warm brown, charcoal, rust red, bone white and muted metal.

Clean original Beastbound Odyssey hand-painted HD 2D sprite illustration; not pixel art, not 3D, not photorealistic. No animal, helmet, blood, magic, extra person, detached weapon, oversized prop, modern object or StoneAge source art.
negativeConstraints: no duplicate or relabeled direction cells
north must be a complete back view with no visible face
northwest and northeast must remain visually distinct back diagonals
no labels, arrows, borders, UI, watermark or scenery
no cropped world subject or cell-edge crossing
no StoneAge source art, character, texture or costume copying
